'''Gotar''' was an [[acid lizard]] to whom the [[mole creature]]s of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] offered the unfortunate victims which fell into their lair as meals. [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] once encountered him.

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 6|''Droids'' (1986) 6]] {{1st}}
